expo.name: Prabha Skincare
expo.description: Prabha is a personalized skincare companion designed for Nepal's weather, water, food, budget, festivals, makeup habits, and local products.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Prabha uses camera access only when you choose to add progress photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Prabha uses photo access only when you choose to upload progress photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Prabha uses your location to show local weather and air quality skincare guidance.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Prabha uses your location to show local weather and air quality skincare guidance.
